title: Panna cotta for banters – and others

seo.title: Panna cotta for banters - and others - Marinda Kook

html:
I've got a sweet tooth that got the better of me this weekend. Decided to make panna cotta the banting way. If you're not following the diet, replace the xylitol with ordinary castor sugar. Soft, soft and delicious, and legal!

 

YOU'LL NEED:

  • 2 tins coconut cream
  • 100 ml xylitol or castor sugar
  • 10 ml vanilla essence
  • 10 g gelatine (1 sachet)
  • 100 ml water
  • pinch of salt
  • 100 ml honey (optional)

NOW:

Put the gelatine in the water and place in the microwave for about 20 seconds so that it dissolves

Mix the coconut cream, xylitol, vanilla essence, pinch of salt and dissolved gelatine with water together.

Place in a cupcake tin or any nice container that's been sprayed with non-stick spray in the fridge for at least 4 hours or overnight.

Warm the honey in the microwave and once you've turned out your panna cotta, drizzle it with the honey.

 

It really is soft, soft and delicious. You can also add a bit of rosewater essence or lemon zest before you let it set in the fridge.

It was truly a winner in our house and I will definitely make it again.
